body.purpose: Long-form rendered writing at a 68ch measure.

metadata.purpose: Paths, anchors, timestamps, and identifiers only.

shadows.name: composer-rest
shadows.purpose: Tight separation for the annotation composer.

shadows.name: drawer-edge
shadows.purpose: Directional edge for the compact navigator drawer.

shadows.name: dialog-float
shadows.purpose: Blocking dialog above its dimmed backdrop only.

motion.name: base
motion.purpose: Drawers, trays, and structural state changes.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: The next unambiguous action: Save or Send.
components.css: .ds-primary { font: 500 0.8125rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; padding: .25rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--primary); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--primary); color: oklch(.99 0 0); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1); } .ds-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-hover); border-color: var(--primary-hover); } .ds-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Mode Control
components.description: Stable Preview, Annotate, and Edit modes.
components.css: .ds-modes { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 2px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface-sunken); } .ds-modes button { font: 500 .8125rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; padding: .25rem .75rem; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted); } .ds-modes button:hover { color: var(--ink); } .ds-modes button[aria-pressed=true] { margin: -1px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg); color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; } .ds-modes button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Appearance Control
components.description: Quiet top-bar control for persisted System, Light, and Dark appearance choices.
components.css: .ds-appearance { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted); } .ds-appearance:hover { background: var(--surface-sunken); color: var(--ink); } .ds-appearance:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-appearance-menu { width: 176px; padding: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--surface); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px oklch(.12 .01 110 / .24); } .ds-appearance-menu button { width: 100%; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 10px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted); font: 500 .8125rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-appearance-menu button:hover, .ds-appearance-menu button[aria-checked=true] { background: var(--surface-sunken); color: var(--ink); }

components.name: Annotation Field
components.description: Quiet field with a dedicated focus halo.
components.css: .ds-field { width: 18rem; min-height: 3.5rem; resize: vertical; font: .8125rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; padding: .5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink); } .ds-field::placeholder { color: var(--muted); } .ds-field:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 14%, transparent); }

components.name: Intent Chip
components.description: Free-wrapping annotation intent, selected through tint, border, and weight.
components.css: .ds-chip { font: .75rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2px .5rem; border: 1px solid var(--primary); border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 10%, var(--bg)); color: var(--primary); font-weight: 600; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); color: var(--ink); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Artifact Row
components.css: .ds-row { width: 16rem; height: 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 0 6px 0 2px; border: 0; border-radius: 5px; background: var(--surface-sunken); color: var(--primary); font: 600 .8125rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: left; } .ds-row:hover { color: var(--ink); } .ds-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Annotation Composer
components.description: The one raised work surface in the contextual margin.
components.html: <section class="ds-composer"><q>Selected passage from the manuscript</q><textarea class="ds-mini" placeholder="What should change?"></textarea><button>Send</button></section>
components.css: .ds-composer { width: 18rem; display: grid; gap: .75rem; padding: .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--bg); color: var(--ink); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(.24 .01 110 / .06); font: .8125rem/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-composer q { color: var(--muted); font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; } .ds-mini { padding: .5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink); } .ds-composer button { justify-self: end; padding: .25rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--primary); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--primary); color: oklch(.99 0 0); } .ds-composer button:hover { background: var(--primary-hover); } .ds-composer :focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: glosa is a precise reading and review instrument. The manuscript is the page; navigation, annotations, provenance, and agent state form the quiet desk around it. The interface combines iA Writer's typographic calm, a copy editor's marked manuscript, and Linear-grade operational clarity only where state needs to be explicit.
keyCharacteristics: Rendered writing dominates a stable 68ch reading measure.
Control surfaces are quiet, flat, and slightly sage-tinted.
One olive accent is rare and functional.
Provenance and delivery state are stated with text or shape as well as color.
Responsive behavior collapses chrome before compromising the manuscript.

rules.name: The Accent Rarity Rule
rules.body: Workbench Olive marks action, focus, selection, or trustworthy state and occupies no more than ten percent of a screen. It never becomes a decorative panel wash.

rules.name: The Status Needs Shape Rule
rules.body: Danger, warning, success, delivery, and provenance always carry a label, icon, or border treatment. Color is never the only channel.

rules.name: The Reading Measure Rule
rules.body: Manuscript prose stays between 65ch and 75ch with generous line-height. Operational panels may be denser; writing never becomes a data table.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Floating Rule
rules.body: Resting panels are flat. Shadows are forbidden unless the element is temporarily above the workspace or needs interaction priority.

dos: Do keep rendered writing as the dominant surface and collapse chrome before shrinking the reading measure.
Do use Workbench Olive only for primary action, focus, selection, and explicit operational state.
Do preserve keyboard access, visible focus, reduced-motion alternatives, and WCAG 2.2 AA contrast.
donts: Don't build a generic AI-workflow dashboard or let agent state compete with the manuscript.
Don't use SaaS landing-page gloss, dark-mode purple gradients, glassmorphism, or decorative agent theatrics.
Don't imply cmux coupling or hide routing, attribution, or delivery behind vague synced language.
